title: Annual Trade Show Booth Setup Memo

all.en: This memo provides instructions for setting up our booth at the Annual Trade Show.
all.zh: 本備忘錄說明本公司於年度展會展位的佈置事宜。

all.en: The trade show will be held at the Northland Exhibition Hall from May 6 to May 9.
all.zh: 本展會將於 5 月 6 日至 5 月 9 日於 Northland 展覽館舉行。

all.en: Our booth is located in section C, space number 214.
all.zh: 本公司展位位於 C 區，編號 214。

all.en: The booth measures six meters wide by four meters deep.
all.zh: 展位寬六公尺、深四公尺。

all.en: Setup access begins at 8:00 a.m. on Tuesday, May 5.
all.zh: 佈展時間自 5 月 5 日星期二上午 8 點起開放。

all.en: All structures must be fully installed by 6:00 p.m. that same day.
all.zh: 所有結構物須於當日下午 6 點前完成架設。

all.en: The marketing team will arrive at 8:30 a.m. with the printed graphics.
all.zh: 行銷團隊將於上午 8 點半攜帶印製好的展板抵達現場。

all.en: The carpenters will assemble the backdrop wall during the first two hours.
all.zh: 木工人員將於前兩小時組裝背板牆面。

all.en: Electricians will install lighting and demo monitors by noon.
all.zh: 電工人員將於中午前完成燈光與示範螢幕的安裝。

all.en: All product samples should be unpacked and inspected before lunchtime.
all.zh: 所有產品樣品應於午餐前完成拆封與檢查。

all.en: Brochures and giveaways will be delivered directly to the booth on Tuesday morning.
all.zh: 型錄與贈品將於週二上午直接送達展位。

all.en: Please verify the quantities against the packing list upon arrival.
all.zh: 貨物送達時請依出貨單確認數量。

all.en: Any damaged items must be reported to the operations lead immediately.
all.zh: 如發現損壞物品，請立即通報營運負責人。

all.en: Booth staff training will take place from 4:00 to 5:30 p.m. on May 5.
all.zh: 展位人員訓練將於 5 月 5 日下午 4 點至 5 點半進行。

all.en: Daily booth hours are from 9:30 a.m. to 5:30 p.m.
all.zh: 每日展位開放時間為上午 9 點半至下午 5 點半。

all.en: Staff should arrive at least thirty minutes before opening each day.
all.zh: 工作人員每日應於開展前至少三十分鐘抵達。

all.en: Two team members must remain at the booth at all times during open hours.
all.zh: 開展期間展位內隨時應有兩名以上人員留守。

all.en: All staff are required to wear the company polo shirt and name badge.
all.zh: 所有人員須穿著公司 Polo 衫並配戴名牌。

all.en: Visitors may scan our QR code to request a follow-up consultation.
all.zh: 訪客可掃描 QR 碼以申請後續諮詢服務。

all.en: Daily lead reports must be submitted by 7:00 p.m. each evening.
all.zh: 每日商機回報須於晚間 7 點前提交。

all.en: Teardown will begin at 5:30 p.m. on Saturday, May 9.
all.zh: 撤展作業將於 5 月 9 日星期六下午 5 點半開始。

all.en: All equipment must be packed and removed by 10:00 p.m. that night.
all.zh: 所有設備須於當晚 10 點前完成打包並撤離。

all.en: If you have any questions, please contact our event coordinator.
all.zh: 如有任何問題，請聯絡本公司活動專案窗口。

all.en: Thank you in advance for your cooperation and professionalism.
all.zh: 預先感謝各位的配合與專業表現。
